hake-stewed-with-vegetables-teleculinari.name: Hake Stewed With Vegetables
instructions: Descasque as cebolas e os alhos, pique-os grosseiramente e refogue-os num tacho largo com o azeite.
Add carrots, peeled and cut into large pieces, and tomatoes into pieces. Water with the white wine, stir and let it stew a little.
Then add the fish and eggplant, cut into pieces, season with salt and pepper and let cook some more.
When the fish is almost cooked, add the curget, cut into large pieces, and let it finish. Serve sprinkled with chopped coriander.

ham-loaf.name: Ham Loaf

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Combine ground ham, oats, evaporated milk, ground pork, onion, eggs, parsley, ground mustard, and pepper in a large bowl; mix well. Form into 2 loaves; place into two 9x13-inch baking dishes.
Bake in the preheated oven for 30 minutes.

A few minutes before the timer goes off, stir together brown sugar and vinegar in a small saucepan and boil for 1 minute. Remove loaves from the oven and pour brown sugar mixture over. Return loaves to the oven; baste frequently with the pan juices until browned and cooked through, 30 to 45 minutes more.
Make sauce: Mix together mayonnaise, sour cream, horseradish, and lemon juice in a small bowl until well combined. Season with salt and pepper.
Serve sauce over sliced ham loaves.

harinilla-traditional-sweet-from-mexico-.name: Harinilla, Traditional Sweet From Mexico
instructions: Coloca el piloncillo en una olla con media taza de agua. Lleva al fuego y diluye hasta formar un caramelo.
Add the butter into a bowl and bate with an electrical beaker to create very well.
When butter is well creamed and soft, it incorporates sugar and eggs. Rebounding back and forth.
Mezcla en un bol los ingredientes secos: la harina, el polvo de hornear y la sal.
Vierte a la mezcla de manteca el caramelo de piloncillo y bate hasta que todo se una.
It gradually incorporates the dry ingredients and intersects manually until a homogenous mass forms.
It purifies the oven at 200 been 3 been.
Una vez lista la masa, divide en porciones iguales, de aproximadamente 20 gramos.
Do balls with the dough, then give them cylinder shape and join both tipples to form a circle that isn't perfect. Press his tips--

Una vez lista, deja reposar y disfruta.

harvest-salad.name: Harvest Salad

ingredients.prep: rinsed and torn into bite-size pieces

ingredients.item: Freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C).
Spread walnuts on a baking sheet. Toast in the preheated oven until nuts begin to brown, about 5 minutes.
Combine walnuts, spinach, tomatoes, avocado, red onion, cranberries, and blue cheese in a large bowl.
Whisk walnut oil, jam, and vinegar together in a small bowl: season with salt and pepper. Pour over salad and toss to coat before serving.

hasenpfeffer.name: Hasenpfeffer
instructions: Bring first 14 ingredients to a boil in a medium pot; turn off heat and let marinade cool. Place rabbit pieces in a glass jar or baking dish; pour marinade over. Cover and chill for 48 hours.
Remove rabbit from marinade; strain marinade through a fine-mesh sieve and set aside; discard solids in sieve.

Heat oil and butter in a large heavy pot. Place some flour in a shallow bowl and dredge rabbit in flour, shaking off excess. Working in batches if needed, cook rabbit, turning once, until golden brown, about 4 minutes per side. Transfer rabbit to a plate and discard drippings from pot. Pour reserved marinade into pot and bring to a simmer. Add rabbit pieces, cover, and simmer gently until rabbit is tender, 1 ½–2 hours. Serve with boiled potatoes or noodles.

herb-and-cheese-poppers.name: Herb And Cheese Poppers

ingredients.item: All purpose flour plus 1/4 cup (or more) for dusting and rolling

instructions: Line 2 large rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper. Mix cheese and next 5 ingredients in medium bowl.

Whisk 2 3/4 cups flour, baking powder, sugar, salt, and baking soda in another medium bowl. Using large holes of box grater, grate frozen butter onto plate. Add grated butter to flour mixture and rub in with fingertips until evenly distributed. Stir in buttermilk just until incorporated (dough will be sticky).

Sprinkle work surface with 1/4 cup flour. Transfer dough to work surface; sprinkle dough with flour. Using hands, press dough into 8-inch square, about 1/2 inch thick; sprinkle more flour on work surface as needed to prevent sticking.

Sprinkle 1/2 cup cheese-herb mixture over 2/3 of surface of dough, leaving remaining 1/3 of dough surface uncovered. To fold as for business letter: Using dough scraper or metal spatula as aid, lift uncovered dough portion from work surface and fold over half of cheese-covered portion; still using dough scraper or metal spatula as aid, lift folded portion over remaining cheese-covered portion.

Sprinkle dough with flour to prevent sticking. Press dough out again to 8-inch square. Spread 1/2 cup cheese-herb mixture over 2/3 of dough; repeat folding as for business letter, then pressing dough out to 8-inch square. Repeat 2 more times with dough and cheese-herb mixture. Roll out dough on floured surface to 10-inch square; cut into 36 small pieces. DO AHEAD Place biscuits in single layer on baking sheets; freeze until firm. Wrap biscuits in single layer in foil, then enclose in resealable freezer bags; freeze up to 2 weeks. Place frozen biscuits 1 inch apart on parchment-lined baking sheets; thaw in refrigerator overnight. Let biscuits stand at room temperature 20 minutes before baking.

Position rack in center of oven; preheat to 260°C. Bake biscuits, 1 sheet at a time, until golden on top and tester inserted into center comes out clean, about 10 minutes. Cool biscuits on baking sheet at least 5 minutes. If desired, cool completely, then rewarm biscuits in 204°C oven 3 minutes before serving.

herbed-pumpkin-gravy.name: Herbed Pumpkin Gravy
instructions: Stir oats into 3 cups water in a saucepan; bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, and cook at a simmer until the oats are tender and the water is absorbed, about 20 minutes.
Stir 2 cups hot water into the cooked oats. Strain water to use as 'oat broth' into a large sauce pan. Save cooked oats for another use.

Stir pumpkin puree, sugar, herbes de Provence, salt, black pepper, and garlic powder into the oat broth with a whisk until smooth; add olive oil and stir to combine. Thin the gravy with more hot water, if desired. Place the saucepan over medium heat, bring the gravy to a simmer, and cook until hot, about 10 minutes.

herby-black-rice-salad-with-radishes-and.name: Herby Black Rice Salad With Radishes And Ricotta Salata

ingredients.item: Sherry vinegar or red wine vinegar
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Combine oil and vinegar in a small airtight container; cover and shake well. Season with salt and pepper.
Do Ahead: Vinaigrette can be made 3 days ahead; chill.

Combine rice and 1¾ cups water in a medium saucepan; season with salt. Bring to a boil on stove over high. Reduce heat, cover saucepan, and simmer until rice is tender and liquid is absorbed, 45–50 minutes. Remove from heat, fluff rice, and let sit, covered, 10 minutes. Let cool.
Just before serving, toss rice and radishes with dressing in a large bowl; season with salt and pepper. Add ricotta salata, almonds, dill, and chives and toss.

herby-sheet-pan-meatballs-with-green-bea.name: Herby Sheet-pan Meatballs With Green Beans

ingredients.prep: seeds and ribs removed if desired, finely chopped

ingredients.item: Finely chopped tender herbs (such as mint
. diamond crystal or 2 0.25 tsp. morton kosher salt
A spice mill or mortar and pestle

instructions: Place a rack in middle of oven and set a rimmed baking sheet on rack. Preheat oven to 450°. Toast 2 tsp. cumin seeds, 2 tsp. fennel seeds, 1 tsp. coriander seeds, and ¼ tsp. black peppercorns in a dry small skillet over medium-high, stirring constantly, until fragrant and seeds are a shade darker, about 1 minute. Transfer to spice mill or mortar and pestle and let cool slightly; reserve skillet. Grind spices to a fine powder.

Transfer spice mix to a large bowl. Add 1 lb. ground turkey, preferably dark meat, 1 medium zucchini, coarsely grated (about 2 cups), zest of 1 lemon, 1 large egg, beaten to blend, 1 serrano chile, seeds and ribs removed if desired, finely chopped, 1¼ cups finely chopped tender herbs, ¾ cup panko, 2 tsp. Diamond Crystal or 1¼ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 tsp. garlic powder. Mix with clean hands until blended (do not overmix). Lightly oil your hands with extra-virgin olive oil and divide meatball mixture into 16 portions, then roll into balls and place on a large plate.

Toss 1 lb. green beans, trimmed, with ¼ cup extra-virgin olive oil and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in another large bowl to coat. Carefully remove baking sheet from oven; spread out green beans on baking sheet. Nestle meatballs among green beans, spacing evenly apart and ensuring good contact with pan (it's okay if the beans and meatballs touch). Return baking sheet to oven and bake until green beans are bright green and meatballs have lost their pink color, 8–10 minutes. Heat broiler. Broil, rotating baking sheet halfway through, until green beans are beginning to char in spots and meatballs are browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.

While the meatballs are cooking, heat 2 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in reserved skillet over medium until hot but not smoking. Remove from heat, add ½ tsp. ground turmeric, and swirl pan to combine. Scrape turmeric oil into a small bowl and add 1 cup plain whole-milk Greek yogurt, ¼ cup tahini, stirred well, 2 Tbsp. fresh lemon juice, and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt; whisk until smooth. Taste yogurt sauce and add more salt and/or lemon juice if needed. Drizzle with more oil and top with toasted sesame seeds (if using).

Serve meatballs and green beans straight from baking sheet or transfer to a platter. Serve with yogurt sauce alongside.
Do Ahead: Meatballs can be formed 1 day ahead; cover and chill. Sauce can be made 2 days ahead; cover and chill.

horseradish-and-honey-glazed-ham.name: Horseradish And Honey-glazed Ham
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Cut ham into 1/4-inch-thick slices. Use kitchen string to tie slices back together in the shape of original ham, then place on a rack set in a roasting pan.
Stir together honey and cloves in a small bowl until well combined; drizzle over ham.
Bake ham in the preheated oven for 1 hour and 15 minutes, basting often with pan drippings.
Mix together brown sugar, horseradish, and lemon juice in a medium bowl until glaze is well combined. Baste ham with glaze, allowing it to drip between slices.
Continue baking until glaze has set, ham has browned, and an instant-read meat thermometer inserted into the center of sliced ham reads at least 60°C (60 degrees C), 25 to 30 more minutes.

horseradish-cream-sauce-for-prime-rib.name: Horseradish Cream Sauce For Prime Rib
instructions: Stir mayonnaise, sour cream, horseradish, ketchup, paprika, salt, cayenne pepper, hot sauce, oregano, and pepper together in a bowl until well combined.
Refrigerate for at least 1 hour before serving to meld flavors.

hot-and-smoky-tang-wings.name: Hot And Smoky Tang Wings

ingredients.prep: tips removed, drumettes and flats separated

ingredients.item: . plus 1 0.5 tsp. diamond crystal or 2 0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Line a large rimmed baking sheet with foil, top with a wire rack, and lightly oil rack with vegetable oil. Mix 2 Tbsp. Tang orange drink mix, 1 Tbsp. chipotle chile powder, 1 tsp. ground coriander, 1 tsp. ground cumin, and ¼ tsp. celery salt in a small bowl to combine (you should have a scant ¼ cup spice mix).

Place 2 lb. chicken wings, tips removed, drumettes and flats separated, in a large bowl and pat dry with paper towels. Add 3 Tbsp. spice mix, 1 Tbsp. plus 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or 2¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, 1 Tbsp. baking powder, 1 Tbsp. white rice flour, 1 Tbsp. granulated onion, and 2 tsp. granulated garlic and toss with your hands until wings are evenly coated. Arrange on prepared rack, spacing evenly apart, and chill, uncovered, at least 4 hours and up to 1 day.
When ready to bake, let wings sit at room temperature 30 minutes.

Place a rack in upper third of oven and preheat to 425°. Drizzle 3 Tbsp. vegetable oil over wings. Bake until cooked through and skin is browned and bubbling, 30–35 minutes. Using tongs, turn wings over and bake until golden brown on other side, 10–15 minutes. (Alternatively, you can grill the wings. Prepare a grill for medium-low heat; lightly oil grate. Grill wings directly on grate, skin side down, until slightly charred, about 2 minutes. Turn wings over and continue griling, turning wings occasionally, until crisp and brown and an instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of a wing registers 165°, 13–18 minutes more.)
Immediately transfer wings to a clean large bowl and toss with remaining spice mixture until evenly coated. Let sit 2 minutes before serving.

hot-wing-hummus.name: Hot Wing Hummus

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine garbanzo beans and great northern beans in a large colander; rinse and allow to drain.

Place the beans, wing sauce, ranch dressing mix, lemon juice, tahini, and garlic in the bowl of a food processor; process until smooth, scraping down the sides as necessary. Add olive oil and blend until hummus has thinned to desired consistency. Season with salt and pepper.

how-to-make-english-cream-or-creme-angla.name: How To Make English Cream Or Crème Anglaise
how-to-make-english-cream-or-creme-angla.original_name: Cómo hacer Crema Inglesa o Crème Anglaise

1 vaina de vainilla o 1 cucharadita de extracto de vainilla

instructions: In a big bowl, mix egg yolks with sugar. Bat till the mixture is soft and pale yellow. That ensures that the sugar dissolve well and that the yolks are fully integrated.
In a saucer, heat up milk with the vanilla pod (if you are using an extract, add after withdrawing milk from the fire). Don't let him get cold and we just want him hot.

Give the mixture back to the saucepan and cook with low heat, preferably to the tidal bath. That helps to control the temperature and stop the cream from burning. Monitoring temperature is key to this recipe. The cream should not exceed 85 ″ 3 ″ (85 ″ 3 ″) to prevent the yolks from clotting and the mixture from cutting. It constantly removes and makes sure that you scrape the bottom of the saucer so that the cream doesn't stick.

The english cream will be ready as soon as it weighs enough to cover the back of the spoon. A finger can be passed through the back of the spoon and if the line you pulled with your finger remains intact, the cream's ready.

Once the cream's ready, pass it through a thin pallet to remove anything and cool it quickly. Can place the bowl with the cream onto another bowl with ice and remove till at room temperature. Then put her in the refrigerator.

how-to-make-pumpkin-pizza-with-carameliz.name: How To Make Pumpkin Pizza With Caramelized Onion, Step By Step
how-to-make-pumpkin-pizza-with-carameliz.original_name: Cómo hacer pizza de calabaza con cebolla caramelizada, paso a paso

ingredients.item: 2 tazas de harina de trigo integral

instructions: We start by preparing the dough for pizza. In a small bowl, mix with warm water and sugar. Let rest for 5-10 minutes till the mixture starts to bubbling.

In a big bowl, it combines wheat flour and salt. Make a hole at the centre of the flour mix and pour the yeast mixture into it. Add olive oil at the centre of the mix. Unite the ingredients to form a mass.

Fold the dough onto a pitted surface for about 10 minutes, or till soft and elastic. Put the dough into a slightly oiled bowl, cover with a moist cloth and leave to rest in a warm place for 1-2 hours or until the dough has been double its size.
While resting the dough, we advanced the caramelized onion and pumpkin purée.

For purée, lava and pumpkin pumpkin, withdrawing the seeds and cutting them into uniform pieces. Put the pieces into a big pot and add enough water to cover pumpkin. Take the pot to a boil and cook at medium heat till pumpkin's tender about 15- 20 minutes.
Drain pumpkin and place it in a big bowl. With a fork or food processor, tighten pumpkin to a smooth and homogenous purée. If you wish, you can add salt to the purée as you choose.

For caramelized onion, cut into thin slices. It heats up a large frying pan with medium and low heat and adds a thin layer of olive oil. Add onion slices to frying pan and sprinkle with a pint of salt to help free the natural juices from onion.

It cooks onions with low heat, stirring occasionally to prevent them from gluing. That can take about 20- 30 minutes. as onions are cooked, they will be caramelized naturally due to their natural sugars. If necessary, add a little more oil to prevent them from pounding but control the impulses to add sugar.
Keep cooking till the onions reach a dark golden color and have a soft and pleasant texture.
It purifies the oven to 220 been 3 been. Divide mass into portions according to the desired size of your pizzas. Expand every portion onto a padded surface to form the basis of pizza.

how-to-make-the-colombian-meringon-step-.name: How To Make The Colombian Meringón: step by step

Cut the guanabana, strawberries and mango into small cubes. mix fruit with honey or paddle with a delicate shape.

Incorporates the steak of choricas into the pot of calos, paw and calves. Meg and cook for 45 minutes till cooking's ready.
Una vez listo, apaga y deja reposar un rato. Sirve y disfruta.

how-to-prepare-chicken-wire-with-poblano.name: How To Prepare Chicken Wire With Poblano Chiles
how-to-prepare-chicken-wire-with-poblano.original_name: Cómo preparar alambre de pollo con chiles poblanos

ingredients.item: 500 g chicken breast without skin (cut into strips or small cubes)
2  chiles poblanos grandes, ( asados, pelados y cortados en rajas)
200 gr de queso oaxaca o manchego rallado
150 g of fresh mushrooms in sheets
1 / 2 cdite of paptika or smoked peppermint

instructions: In a bowl, mix chicken with lemon juice, salt, pepper, cumin and paprika. Let them rest for 15 minutes while you prepare the rest of the ingredients.

Put them directly onto the stove's flame or into the oven until your skin's black and bubbling. Put them in a closed plastic bag for 10 minutes so they sweat, then paddle them, remove the seeds and cut them into cuts.
In a large frying pan or wok, heat olive oil with medium-high heat. Add onion and garlic, damper for about 3 minutes until clear. Add your peppers and mushrooms and cook for another 5 minutes.
Incorporates tipple chicken and cooks till it's golden and well baked (8-10 minutes). Add pumpkin and pumpkins. He cooks everything together for another 5 minutes.
It reduces the fire to a minimum, sprinks the cheese onto the mixture and cover the frying pan till completely frying. Kill the fire.
Sirve caliente y espolvorea con cilantro fresco

how-to-prepare-colombian-flakes-at-home-.name: How To Prepare Colombian Flakes At Home
how-to-prepare-colombian-flakes-at-home-.original_name: Cómo preparar hojuelas colombianas en casa

ingredients.item: 2 o 3 cdas de leche o agua
1 slice of orange or lemon shell

instructions: In a bowl, mix flour and sugar and salt. It forms a hole at the centre and adds an egg and melted butter.
Incorpora poco a poco la leche o el agua hasta obtener una masa suave, lisa y no pegajosa. Amasa durante 5 a 7 minutos.
Cover the dough and let her rest for 20 minutes. That step is key to achieve thin and crispy pits.
Divide la masa en dos porciones. Estira cada una con rodillo sobre una superficie ligeramente enharinada hasta que quede casi transparente.
Cut irregular strips or rectangles, depending on traditional style.
Heat oil at medium-high temperature (170-175-3). Fry the pits into small pits till they are golden and crispy. Retire and scrain onto absorbing paper.
To the syrup, carry with medium heat the panels, water, cinnamon, nail and citrus shell. Cooking till slightly thick and light honey texture. Add lemon juice and remove from fire.
Serves with hot or tibia syrup with a shower.

how-to-prepare-t-bone-sous-vide-comedera.name: How To Prepare T-bone Sous Vide

ingredients.item: 2  piezas  de t-bone ((aproximadamente 350 g cada una))
1 cda de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra)
1 cdite of freshly ground black pepper
1 cda of balsamic vinegar ((to enhance flavour))
1 cda of brown sugar (optional for a touch of sweetness)

instructions: Start by cleaning up the T-bone and drying with absorbent paper. Then sew with salt and pepper to taste. Put the rosemary and the crushed garlic onto his flesh to put his aromas at his best while cooking.

Put every piece of T-bone into a plastic bag to sous vida. Add a tablespoon of olive oil, Dijon mustard and, if you wish, Worcestershire and balsamic vinegar. Seal the empty bag, make sure there's no air inside.

It purifies the water bath at 56-3-3 (56-3-3) for a middlepoint cooking. Enter the bags with T-bone into the water and cook for 2 hours. If you prefer a more made term, you can extend cooking to 3 hours.

Once after the time of cooking, remove meat pieces from bags and seal them slightly with paper. Warm an anti-stick frying pan with high heat, add butter and, when hot, add T-bone pieces. Seal each side for 2 minutes to glow and achieve a crisp texture from the outside but juicy from inside.
Put the T-bones in a plate, seer with a touch of salt and pepper to suit and join them with your favorite garrison (purée of potatoes, fresh salads or roasted vegetables).

hungry-dads-mexican-inspired-casserole.name: Hungry Dad's Mexican-inspired Casserole

ingredients.item: Diced tomatoes with green chile peppers

instructions: Heat a large nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add ground beef and onion to the hot skillet; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes. Reduce heat to low and stir in diced tomatoes, black beans, picante sauce, and taco seasoning. Simmer until most of the liquid has evaporated, about 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9x13-inch baking dish with cooking spray.

Spread flour tortillas in the prepared baking dish, overlapping to cover the bottom and sides. Spread beef mixture over tortillas, and sprinkle with 3/4 cup Monterey Jack cheese, 3/4 cup pepper Jack cheese, and 1 1/2 cups crushed tortilla chips. Cover with aluminum foil.

Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes. Remove from oven and discard foil. Sprinkle remaining Monterey Jack cheese, pepper Jack cheese, and crushed tortilla chips on top. Place back in the oven and bake, uncovered, until cheese is melted and bubbly, 8 to 10 minutes. Sprinkle with green onion and cilantro and serve with sour cream.

hunts-bruschetta-chicken-skillet.name: Hunt's Bruschetta Chicken Skillet

ingredients.item: Shredded italian cheese blend or mozzarella cheese

instructions: Stir together drained tomatoes, cheese, and basil in a medium bowl; set aside.

Place chicken between 2 sheets of heavy plastic on a solid, level surface. Firmly pound chicken with the smooth side of a meat mallet to a 1/2-inch thickness. Top evenly with tomato mixture, pressing onto chicken.

Combine tomato sauce and garlic in large skillet; add chicken. Bring sauce to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and cook 15 minutes or until chicken is no longer pink in center and measures 74°C on an instant-read thermometer.
Top with croutons just before serving.
